title: Extended Token Usage Telemetry: Tool Calls, CoT Length, Tests Run

story.as_a: operator evaluating agent behavior across stories
story.i_want_to: have token_usage_reports carry additional behavioral signals (tool_call_count, cot_length_tokens, tests_run_count) per story per role
story.so_that: loopctl can compute lazy-bastard scores (US-26.6.2) and flag suspicious stories for re-review

rationale: Lazy-bastard detection (L5 in the chain-of-custody v2 stack) relies on mechanical signals from agent telemetry. The existing token_usage infrastructure from Epic 21 is close but missing three fields that the research literature identified as the strongest indicators of premature task declaration.

acceptance_criteria.description: Migration adds columns to `token_usage_reports`: `tool_call_count` (integer nullable), `cot_length_tokens` (integer nullable), `tests_run_count` (integer nullable). All nullable for backward compat with existing reports.
`POST /api/v1/token-usage` accepts the three new fields in the request body. Schema updated in OpenAPI spec.
mcp-server's token_usage reporting helper updates to include the new fields. Agents can now report telemetry along with each token usage submission.
`Loopctl.TokenUsage.Analytics` queries gain aggregation dimensions: average, p50, p95, p99 of each new field per story, per role, per agent_id.
New MCP tool `mcp__loopctl__knowledge_agent_usage` response includes the new aggregates.
Backward compat: existing callers reporting without the new fields continue to work; the fields are stored as null.
System article `agent-telemetry` documents the reporting contract and what the new fields mean. Full content authored inline in this story (~500 words).
CHANGELOG entry describing the new fields. OpenAPI schema updated. Integration test asserts the new fields are stored and queryable.

test_cases.name: POST /token-usage with new fields stores them correctly
expected_results: Record is stored with all three values

test_cases.name: Backward compat: POST without new fields stores nulls
expected_results: Record stored with new fields = null

test_cases.name: Analytics aggregates the new fields
expected_results: Result includes mean, p50, p95, p99 of tool_call_count

technical_notes: OpenAPI schema: add fields to TokenUsageReport schema in api_spec/schemas.ex.
mcp-server helper: update mcp-server/index.js report_token_usage wrapper.
Reference: docs/chain-of-custody-v2.md section 3 L5 and section 10 Phase 6.
